title: Amtech V4035 P240 Grit Hook and Loop Delta Sanding Sheets, 10 piece set, 140mm x 140mm x 100mm Triangle Sanding Paper, Clear
features: EXTRA FINE SANDING: These delta sanding sheets have a P240 grit for extra fine sanding and are perforated for dust extraction
VERSATILE: With a hook a loop attachment, they are 140mm x 140mm x 100mm in size and are ideal for sanding most types of wood and painted surfaces
USE WITH V6040: They are compatible with Amtech’s 180W 2-in-1 detail sander (stock code V6040) plus other brands
Compatible with Amtech V6005 180W detail sander & other brands
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description The Amtech Delta Sanding Sheet range is suitable for polishing various types of wood and painted surfaces, in order to achieve your desired finish. You can also use the triangle sanding sheets on various metal surfaces and automotive coatings, whilst carrying out repairs. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
